_comment: POST /v1/incarnations/{name}/upgrade - transition an incarnation to a new service version (git-ref) in a single tx + run state_schema migrations (ADR-019). to_version - the service's git-ref (not a state_schema_version number); migration 001_to_002 (state_schema v1 -> v2: redis_users list of names -> map name->{perms,state}) runs when an incarnation created on an earlier ref with state_schema_version=1 is switched to a ref of the consolidated redis (state_schema_version=2). Body: only name (echoed, ignored) + to_version; other fields -> 400 (additionalProperties:false).
name: test-cache-redis-cl-dev
